title: Ancient One Force opponent Limited Summons to battle their primary creature

card.rawText: During your opponents' turn, if they control Limited Summons, they must use their Limited Summons to battle their primary creature. Normal battle rules apply.

plan.title: Ancient One Force opponent Limited Summons to battle their primary creature

notes: Opponent controls a Limited Summon during their turn; force it to battle their primary creature.
